Extend the leafy dough on a floured bench until a rectangle is left. Spread over the previous mixture leaving a margin on one side about 5 cm wide. Brush this margin with the beaten egg, wrap it in the direction of width so as to get a long roll and cut into slices about 1.5 cm thick.

Have it on water-sprinkled trays and take it to the oven preheated at 200oC for approximately 25 minutes or until they are golden. Remove, take off immediately with a spatula and serve decorated to taste, for example with olives.

instructions: To begin with, we will awaken with a small saucepan the vinegar of rice or myrin, sake, soy sauce and sugar. We'll remove the ingredients so they'll mix well.

If they haven't got their ginger broken up yet, note that we have to skin them first. Once we have passed through the paddle, we will have a tablespoon (or even a little less) and we will add it to the liquid that we have already drawn from the fire. We will also mix oil and mustard if we have decided to use that last. We'll have a good reveling of this sauce.

The dataki marinade is performed by allowing the tuna loin to stand inside this liquid for an hour (some leave it up to 8 hours to have a better taste). We will do this in a container put up in the refrigerator, covered so that our preparation does not reset. If the fish isn't fully covered with the liquid, we have to turn them about half the rest time.

Once we have been seawold, we will get the tuna out and seal it quickly, onto an iron or frying pan. It's best to grease the surface with a little more oil to prevent tuna from gluing. The plate should be hot and hot as soon as we place the tuna and we will simply seal or light it. That means we'll only let him cook a few seconds, both sides, to get our piece baked out and raw inside.

When we remove the tuna from his cooking, we'll put it through a plate with sesame grains to bounce. It may be a good idea to remove the fish back into the remains of a marinade so that the seeds will stick more easily. Some people prefer to bounce them before sealing them, but I leave them for later, to avoid the risk that some sesame grains will be burned and become bitter, and that they will not restrict contact between fish meat and heat.
Once we have bounced the tuna, we will be leaking it into fine sheets with the help of a big and very sharp knife. We'll try and get a 4 to 5 mm thick plate.

instructions: Puree first 5 ingredients in blender until smooth. With machine running, gradually add vegetable oil, then olive oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Place potatoes in large saucepan. Add enough water to cover potatoes by 1 inch. Sprinkle with salt. Bring to boil and cook until potatoes are tender, 10 to 15 minutes, depending on size of potatoes. Drain; let cool 5 minutes. Place in medium bowl. Add 1/4 cup vinaigrette; toss to coat. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Heat olive oil in small skillet over medium-high heat. Add capers and fry until capers are crisp and open like flowers, stirring often, 45 to 60 seconds. Using slotted spoon, transfer capers to paper towels to drain. DO AHEAD Potatoes and capers can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Place asparagus in large bowl. Add 2 tablespoons vinaigrette and toss to coat. Toss potatoes again to coat, adding 1 more tablespoon vinaigrette if dry. Place greens and radishes in another large bowl. Toss with enough vinaigrette to coat. Spread greens and radishes over large platter. Arrange potatoes, asparagus, eggs, and tuna atop greens. Drizzle some vinaigrette over tuna. Sprinkle with fried capers and chive blossoms, if desired.

tuna-white-bean-and-red-onion-salad.name: Tuna, White Bean, And Red Onion Salad

ingredients.item: Cooked white beans (see cannellini beans with garlic and sage)
6-ounce cans tuna packed in olive oil

instructions: Place beans in large bowl. Add tuna and onion; drizzle with oil. Toss gently to combine. Season with salt and generous amount of freshly ground black pepper.

turbot-fillet-with-two-color-sauce-lezze.name: Turbot Fillet With Two Color Sauce

ingredients.item: Several branches of derein and parsley

instructions: 1. Peel the pumpkin and bark and chop it in the form of kibrit trash.
2. Cook and strain in salty water.
3. Extract Maydanosis and boiled up to 4 minutes in boiling water.
4. Pass the mixer and harvest.
5. Extract boiling pepper and rub it up to 30 minutes until the light salted water soften.
6. peel off the shells and make it pure.
7. Add a little butter, salt, pepper.
8. melt the butter in the pan and fry the shield filltoyu.
9.  Tuz ve biber ekleyin.
10. Cook the boiled pumpkin and caviar before the service in some butter.
11. 11. Add green sauce cream and boil until it gets dark.
12. Place vegetables that you like in the service plate.
12. August Insert fish and add them.
14 July Decorate over with parsley and derelate.
15. Serve hot.

turducken.name: Turducken
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Lay the deboned chicken skin-side down on a platter and season liberally with salt, pepper and Creole seasoning.
Lay the deboned duck skin-side down on top of the chicken and season liberally with salt, pepper and Creole seasoning.
Cover and refrigerate.
Lay the deboned turkey skin-side down on a flat surface.
Cover with a layer of cold sausage and oyster dressing and push the dressing into the leg and wing cavities so they will look as if they still have bones in them.
Lay the duck on top of the turkey skin-side down and cover it with a layer of cold dressing.
Lay the chicken on top of the duck skin-side down and cover it with a layer of cold dressing.
With the help of an assistant, bring the edges of the turkey skin up and fasten them together with toothpicks.
Use the kitchen string to lace around the toothpicks to help hold the stuffed turkey together.
Carefully place the turducken, breast up in a large roasting pan.
Roast covered for 4 hours or until the turducken is golden brown.
Continue to roast uncovered for 1 hour or until a meat thermometer inserted through the thigh registers 82°C and a thermometer inserted through the stuffing registers 74°C.
Check the turducken every few hours to baste and remove excess liquid.
Carve and serve.

turkey.name: Turkey
instructions: Rub turkey inside and out with kosher salt; place in a large stockpot and cover with cold water. Cover and refrigerate to allow turkey to soak in brine solution for 12 hours, or overnight.

Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Remove turkey from brine and discard liquid. Pat turkey dry thoroughly with paper towels — inside and out. This removes excess moisture and also helps skin crisp during roasting.
Brush turkey with 1/2 of the melted butter.

Place the turkey breast-side down on a roasting rack in a shallow roasting pan. Stuff the cavity with half the onions, carrots, celery, one sprig of thyme, and the bay leaf. Scatter the remaining vegetables and thyme in the pan around the turkey. Pour white wine over the vegetables.

Roast turkey in the preheated oven, uncovered, until no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 3 ½ to 4 hours. Carefully turn turkey breast-side up about 2/3 through the roasting time, and brush with remaining butter. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Allow turkey to rest for 30 minutes before carving.

turkey-cheese-pinwheels.name: Turkey & Cheese Pinwheels
instructions: Spread the mustard on the tortilla, and lay down the cheese and turkey.
Tightly roll up the tortilla, and cut into slices.
Serve with a clementine and sliced bell pepper.
Enjoy!

turkey-zucchinistuffed-jack-o-lantern-be.name: Turkey & Zucchini–stuffed Jack-o’-lantern Bell Peppers
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the oil and cook onions and garlic for 3 minutes, or until they start to soften. Add the ground turkey to the pan, followed by salt, pepper, and oregano. Stir and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Then add zucchini and diced tomatoes. Cook until zucchini has begun to soften and remove from heat.
Cut the top off of the bell pepper low enough that the stem remains attached and remove the seeds. Save the top!
Preheat oven to 350˚F (180˚C).
Carefully, carve out your desired jack-o’-lantern face using a steak knife or paring knife. Repeat for the rest of the bell peppers.

Place carved bell peppers in a baking dish and spoon in a layer of cooked rice in the bottom followed by the turkey mixture, and top with mozzarella cheese. Put the top of the bell pepper back on top.
Bake for 35 minutes or until peppers are tender and the cheese has melted.
Enjoy!

turkey-and-apple-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Turkey And Apple Salad Recipe
turkey-and-apple-salad-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de ensalada de pavo y manzana
instructions: Inicia la receta y toma la pechuga de pavo. Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Warm a grill or a frying pan and have a good fat. Cooking turkey breast for 15 minutes, both sides till well cooked.
Una vez, lista vas a cortar en tiras o cubos medianos.
Take apples, remove seeds and cut into sheets or cuts.
En un bol, coloca el berro, la pechuga y esparce las manzanas. Luego, agrega las nueces troceadas y las pasas rojas.
In a bowl, mix the balsamic vinegar, tidon mustard, a tablespoon of olive oil, salt and pepper. It integrates everything.
Vierte la vinagreta en la ensalada, culmina con el queso feta y listo.
Dsifruit!

turkey-and-apple-skewers-recipe-comedera.name: Turkey And Apple Skewers Recipe
turkey-and-apple-skewers-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de brochetas de pavo y manzana
instructions: corta la carne de pavo en cubos, ponla en un bol y sazona con sal y pimienta.
Agrega la mostaza y la salsa de soya. Mezcla y marina por 10 minutos.
Mientras, toma la manzana y corta a la mitad. Retira las semillas y el tallo del centro. Luego, corta en rebanadas gruesas.
Luego, toma la cebolla, pela y corta en cubos.
Warm a frying pan, barbecue, grill or plate. If it's best for the barbecue.
When your turkey's already tipsy, get your knickers and get an apple, onion and turkey intersectially.
Once you have them all armed, cook for about 20 minutes on both sides. The amount of time will depend on where you cook it.
After that time, remove the knipes and they will be ready to taste.

turkey-and-avocado-burrito-recipe-comede.name: Turkey And Avocado Burrito Recipe
turkey-and-avocado-burrito-recipe-comede.original_name: Receta de burrito de pavo y aguacate

ingredients.item: 400 gr de pechuga de pavo cocida y desmenuzada
1/2 taza de crema agria ((opcional, para un toque cremoso))

instructions: In a frying pan, it heats olive oil with medium heat and pits the garlic and onion and pits for 3-4 minutes till they are golden.
Add the padded turkey and mix well with the ingredients, with salt, pepper and lime juice. Cooking for about 3 minutes so that the turkey absorbs its taste. Pull back from the fire.

While cooling his turkey, cut his avocado by half, remove his bone and remove his pulp. Put it in a bowl and slightly tighten with a fork, seeping with salt, pepper and a pinch of lime juice to avoid its oxidizing.

Put an omelette onto a flat surface. At the centre of the omelette, put up a portion of crisp (optional) black beans, then add a generous cape of pitted turkey, followed by some sour cream and avocado purée.
Add minced tomato, lettuce strips and, if you wish, a few drops of hot sauce. Finally, decorate with some fresh cilantro if you prefer.
Fold the tortilla sides to the centre and then start rolling from the bottom up, making sure you keep all the ingredients inside the tortilla.
Corta el burrito a la mitad para facilitar su consumo y sirve de inmediato.

turkey-and-cheddar-cheese-wrap-recipe-co.name: Turkey And Cheddar Cheese Wrap Recipe
turkey-and-cheddar-cheese-wrap-recipe-co.original_name: Receta de wrap de pavo y queso cheddar
instructions: Condimenta las pechugas de pavo rebanadas por ambos lados.
Calienta una plancha o un grill con aceite de oliva. Una vez a temperatura, cocina las pechugas de pavo. 7 minutos por cada lado hasta que queden jugosas y suaves. Reserva.
Take the tomato and cut into cuts. Stretch lettuce very well so it's easy to add to the wrap.
In a small bowl or bowl, add mayonnaise, tomato sauce and mustard. Mix very well till you form a delicious dip.
Para armar el wrap, toma las tortillas de harina y calienta un poco hasta que queden un poco tostadas.
Luego, vas a colocar las rebanadas de queso cheddar y la pechuga de pavo. Sigue con las rodajas de tomate, un poco de lechuga troceada y culmina con el dip.
Wrap your wrap very well, trying to get him to put his tiptoes right. He cuts half and's ready to eat.
Enjoy!

turkey-and-chickpea-stew-with-chorizo-te.name: Turkey And Chickpea Stew With Chorizo
turkey-and-chickpea-stew-with-chorizo-te.original_name: Guisado de peru e grão com chouriço
instructions: Cut the meat into cubes and the sausage into large slices. Peel the onions and garlic, cut the onions into half-moons and grossly pinch the garlic teeth.

Light a pot with the olive oil, add the onions and garlic and let it shine. Water with the wine and let me see. Add the blonde and tomatoes, previously cut into cubes, season with salt and pepper and let cook, stirring from time to time, until the meat becomes soft.
Finally, add the cooked grain and let it cook in mild heat for about 15 minutes. Serve sprinkled with chopped parsley.

turkey-and-hummus-wrap-recipe-comedera.name: Turkey And Hummus Wrap Recipe
turkey-and-hummus-wrap-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de wrap de pavo y hummus

ingredients.item: 200 g de pechuga de pavo rebanada
1 taza de hojas de espinaca fresca
3 cdas de aceite de oliva extra virgen

instructions: Esta receta vamos a iniciarla preparando el hummus casero. Una vez cocidos y escurridos los garbanzos, procedemos a colocarlo en un procesador de alimentos. Si no tienes, puedes emplear la licuadora.

To the mixture of chickenpods, we add tahini, minced garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, cumin, salt and pepper. Unite all ingredients up to a smooth consistency. If you wish it a little more liquid, add water gradually to achieve the desired appearance.
Test and adjust the condiments as you prefer.
Once the hummus's ready, we will proceed to extend the wheat omelette onto a flat surface that's clear and dry.
Corta en rodajas finas el tomate y el pepino.
Unta una capa generosa de hummus casero sobre la tortilla.
Coloca las rebanadas de pechuga de pavo sobre el hummus, bien extendidas que cubran toda la tortilla.
Agrega a la tortilla el tomate y el pepino junto a las hojas frescas de espinaca.
Sprinkle carrot previously ground onto other ingredients.
Expand the lemon juice onto the mixture to give them a more fresh touch. If you're not a fan of sour flavors, you can omit this step.
Before closing tortillas, add a tablespoon of natural Greek yogurt and put some black pepper and salt to taste.
Fold the tortilla ends and firmly enclose it. Cut the turkey wrap by half at a vertical angle to serve.

turkey-and-mushroom-risotto.name: Turkey And Mushroom Risotto

ingredients.prep: but white buttons will do), thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Bring stock to a simmer in a medium pot over medium heat. Reduce heat to low. Cover and keep warm.

Meanwhile, melt 3 tablespoons butter in a large pot over medium heat until it begins to foam. Add onion. Sauté, stirring occasionally, until onion is soft and translucent and just beginning to turn golden, about 5 minutes.
Add mushrooms; cook, stirring occasionally, until soft, and any liquid released has evaporated, 5-7 minutes.

Add rice; stir to coat. Add 1/2 cup warm stock and stir constantly until liquid is absorbed. Continue adding stock by 1/2-cupfuls, stirring constantly, until rice is tender but still firm to the bite, about 20 minutes. Add leftover turkey meat, if using; stir to combine and to warm through, adding a little stock or water if necessary to keep mixture creamy, about 3 minutes.
Stir Parmesan and remaining 1 tablespoon butter into risotto. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Divide among warm bowls. Garnish with chopped parsley.

turkey-and-pork-chili.name: Turkey And Pork Chili

ingredients.item: Diced tomatoes with green chile peppers
Diced tomatoes with green peppers and onions

instructions: Coat a large saucepan with cooking spray over medium heat. Add 1 chopped sweet onion; cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Add chicken broth, chili starter, and oregano; increase heat to medium-high and simmer for 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, coat a large stock pot with cooking spay; reduce heat to medium. Add bell pepper, remaining 1/2 chopped sweet onion, and jalapeño; cook until tender, 5 to 8 minutes. Add cocoa powder, chili powder, ground cumin, garlic salt, paprika, and cayenne pepper; cook 2 minutes. Stir in ground turkey and pork; cook and stir until meat is crumbly, evenly browned, and no longer pink, about 10 minutes. Drain and discard any excess grease.
Stir in chicken broth mixture, diced tomatoes with green chiles, fire-roasted tomatoes, and diced tomatoes with green peppers and onions; simmer about 3 hours.

turkey-and-spinach-pie-teleculinaria.name: Turkey And Spinach Pie

ingredients.item: 300 g  carne de peru em pedacinhos

instructions: Preheat the oven at 180oC. Unroll the leafy dough and line with it a tart, keeping underneath the accompanying vegetable paper. Reserve.
Descasque e pique a cebola e os dentes de alho e leve-os a alourar numa frigideira com o azeite. Junte o peru e envolva bem, deixando saltear.
Then add the frozen spinach and let it cook until it becomes soft and the mixture runs out of liquid. In the end, correct the salt and season with pepper. Add cream and wrap well.
Fill the dough with the previous mixture and sprinkle with grated cheese. Put it in the oven for about 30 minutes, or until it's golden. Remove, deform and serve hot.

turkey-and-stuffing-casserole-for-two.name: Turkey And Stuffing Casserole For Two

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Generously coat a 2 1/2-quart baking dish with butter. Place bread on baking sheets.
Toast bread in the preheated oven until golden brown, flipping halfway through cooking time, about 15 minutes total.
While bread is toasting, melt 2 tablespoons butter in olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Saute onion and celery until soft and slightly browned, 5 to 7 minutes.

Cube toast and put in a large mixing bowl with sauteed vegetables. Season with poultry seasoning, salt, and pepper. Add enough chicken broth to mash mixture together and form a moist, but not wet stuffing. Transfer mixture to the prepared baking dish.

Rinse turkey under cold water and pat dry. Lay turkey breast, skin-side up, on top on stuffing mixture. Slip cubes of butter under the skin and pour melted butter over top. Season lightly with salt and pepper. Tent with aluminum foil.

Bake in the preheated oven for 2 1/2 hours. Remove foil and continue to bake until turkey is no longer pink in the center, juices run clear, and skin browns, about 30 minutes more. Transfer turkey to a plate and let stand 10 minutes before slicing.

turkey-and-stuffing-meatballs.name: Turkey And Stuffing Meatballs

ingredients.prep: grated on the large holes of a box grater

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: peewee, or new potatoes, scrubbed, halved

instructions: Place a rack in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 375°. Pour ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil over a rimmed baking sheet; set aside. Mix one 6-oz. package stuffing mix, preferably turkey (about 2½ cups), and 1 cup whole milk in a large bowl and let sit 5 minutes.

Mix 1 medium onion, grated on the large holes of a box grater, 1 large egg, 1 lb. ground turkey, ½ cup finely chopped parsley, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder, 1½ tsp. freshly ground pepper, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt to bowl with stuffing mixture and mix until just combined. Working one at a time, scoop out about ¼-cup portions of meat mixture and roll into balls (they will be very soft). Place on prepared baking sheet and roll in oil to coat.

Toss 3 lb. baby Yukon Gold, peewee, or new potatoes, scrubbed, halved, 1½ lb. green beans, trimmed, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, remaining ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, remaining 2 tsp. garlic powder, and remaining 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper in a large bowl to combine. Arrange vegetables in a single layer on another rimmed baking sheet.

Bake meatballs on upper rack and vegetables on lower rack, rotating pans back to front and tossing vegetables halfway through, until meatballs are cooked through and lightly browned and potatoes are tender and deeply browned, 30–35 minutes for meatballs and 40–45 minutes for vegetables.

Meanwhile, purée one 14-oz. can whole berry cranberry sauce, 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest, 3 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, 3 Tbsp. honey, and remaining ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt in a blender on medium until smooth, about 30 seconds. Set sauce aside until ready to serve.
Arrange meatballs on top of vegetables and serve with reserved sauce alongside.

turkey-bacon-and-egg-toast.name: Turkey Bacon And Egg Toast
instructions: Top toast with turkey bacon, eggs, and sprinkle with cheese.
Enjoy!

turkey-bacon-and-egg-white-sandwiches.name: Turkey Bacon And Egg White Sandwiches

ingredients.item: Cheddar cheese slices (or your favorite cheese)s

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Lightly coat an 8-inch square nonstick baking dish with cooking spray. Pour in the egg whites, and sprinkle with the salt and pepper. Place in the oven, and bake for 18–20 minutes, until the eggs are just set and the edges pull away slightly from the dish.

While the eggs bake, heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add the bacon, and cook, turning occasionally, for about 3 minutes per side, or until crispy and browned. Transfer to a plate lined with paper towels. Set aside.

Remove eggs from the oven, and let cool for 2 minutes. (Do not turn the oven off.) Cut evenly 6 squares, or use a round cookie cutter to cut 6 perfectly shaped circles. Set aside. (Leftover egg trimmings can be eaten right away or stored in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 2 days for a quick snack.)

Arrange the English muffins, cut side up, on a rimmed baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Brush the cut sides with the melted butter. Bake at 177°C (or air-fry at 177°C) for 5–6 minutes, until light golden.

Place a cheese slice on the bottom half of each muffin. Top each with 1 egg piece and a bacon slice. Top with the muffin tops. Let sandwiches cool completely at room temperature, 10–15 minutes (this prevents steam from making them soggy in the freezer later).

Wrap each cooled sandwich tightly in parchment paper. Transfer the wrapped sandwiches to a freezer-safe bag or airtight container. Store in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or in the freezer for up to 2 months.
To reheat from frozen, unwrap each sandwich, and microwave on HIGH for 1½–2 minutes, until heated through. Alternatively, air-fry at 177°C for 15-20 minutes, until hot and the cheese is melted.

turkey-bacon-breakfast-sliders.name: Turkey Bacon Breakfast Sliders
instructions: Preheat Griddler, fitted with the griddle plates, to 218°C (220°C) and grease with nonstick spray.
On a cutting board, arrange 4 slices of turkey bacon vertically directly next to each other. Weave the 5 remaining bacon slices horizontally through the vertical pieces.
Wrap the bacon weave onto a rolling pin, taking care to keep it intact. Carefully transfer the bacon to the griddle and carefully unroll in an even layer.
Close the Griddler and cook for 8 minutes, until the bacon is fully cooked and has begun to crisp up. Remove the bacon weave from the Griddler.
Use a bread knife to slice the intact loaf of rolls crosswise so that the bottoms can be separated from the tops. Set aside the top half.
Place the bacon weave on the bottom half of the rolls.
Distribute the scrambled eggs on top of the bacon weave, smoothing them into an even layer.
Place the cheese on top of the eggs, covering as much area as possible.
Place the lettuce on top of the cheese.
Place the tomato slices evenly on top of the lettuce leaves.
Replace the top half of the rolls and slice the individual sliders.
Enjoy!

turkey-bacon-spinach-and-cheese-zucchini.name: Turkey Bacon, Spinach, And Cheese Zucchini-wrapped Quiche
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin with nonstick spray.
Trim the ends from the zucchini, then slice lengthwise with a vegetable peeler.
Line the muffin cups with the zucchini strips on the bottom and sides.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, cheddar cheese, turkey bacon, spinach, milk, salt, and pepper.
Divide the egg mixture evenly among the zucchini cups.
Bake for 18 minutes, until the edges are slightly browned.
Enjoy!

turkey-barbacoa-tacos-with-black-beans.name: Turkey Barbacoa Tacos With Black Beans

ingredients.item: Salsa de chile morita (click for recipe) and queso fresco or dry farmer cheese

instructions: Toast sesame seeds in a dry large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium heat, stirring, until golden, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a blender.

Place skillet over medium-high heat and add tomatoes, garlic, and 4 onion halves and cook, turning often, until softened and charred in spots, 5−8 minutes. Transfer tomatoes to blender; set onions and garlic aside.

Cook chiles in same skillet, turning often, until darkened and fragrant, about 1 minute. Add to blender. Once cool enough to handle, peel garlic and onion and add to blender along with 1 Tbsp. salt. Blend until smooth.
Divide drumsticks between 2 resealable plastic bags. Add tomato purée, dividing evenly. Seal bags, pressing out air, and toss to coat. Chill at least 12 hours.

Preheat oven to 325°. Line a large roasting pan with banana leaves, then individually wrap drumsticks with the marinade (use all of it) in banana leaves; place in pan. Cover with any remaining leaves, then cover pan tightly with foil. Bake until meat is very tender and falling off the bone (tear into packets with a fork to check), 2−2½ hours. Let cool slightly.

Meanwhile, drain beans and combine with carrots, celery, cumin, and remaining onion halves in a large pot. Add water to cover by 2”; season generously with pepper. Bring to a gentle simmer and cook, partially covered, seasoning with salt halfway through, until beans are tender, 80−90 minutes. Pluck out carrots, celery, and onion.
Transfer drumsticks and any marinade to a large bowl; discard banana leaves.
Pour turkey cooking liquid from roasting pan into a large glass measuring cup; season sauce with salt.
Scrape off cooked marinade from turkey legs, then shred meat into bite-size pieces; discard skin, bones, and sinews. Combine shredded meat with marinade; season with salt if needed.
Serve turkey with tortillas, salsa, queso fresco, and small cups of sauce. Serve beans with some of their liquid.

turkey-biryani.name: Turkey Biryani

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
. kashmiri or other red chile powder
Plus 2 tbsp. ghee or vegetable oil

instructions: Rinse 2 cups basmati rice in a mesh sieve or a colander under cold running water until water runs clear. Transfer to a medium bowl and pour in cold water to cover by at least 1"; let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, mix 2 lb. cooked turkey meat, chopped into bite-size pieces (about 6 cups), 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, 1 cup plain whole-milk yogurt, 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. garam masala, 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 Tbsp. tomato paste, 1½ tsp. ground coriander, 1 tsp. Kashmiri or other chile powder (such as cayenne), and 1 tsp. ground cumin in a medium bowl. Taste and season with more salt if needed; set turkey mixture aside.

Melt ⅔ cup ghee in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over high heat. Add 4 medium onions, thinly sliced, and cook, stirring often, until dark golden brown and just starting to crisp, 25–35 minutes. Remove from heat and transfer half of onions to paper towels with a slotted spoon; let drain. Set remaining onions aside in pot.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Pour water into a medium saucepan to fill by three quarters; salt generously. Drain rice and place in saucepan. Add 2 dried bay leaves, one 2" cinnamon stick, 6 whole cloves, and 5 green cardamom pods. Set over high heat and bring to a boil. Immediately reduce heat to medium and simmer until rice is mostly cooked (it should still have some chew in the center), about 5 minutes. Drain rice and rinse under cold running water. Shake sieve to remove excess water from rice; set aside.

Add remaining 2 Tbsp. ghee to reserved onions in pot and melt over medium heat. Add reserved turkey mixture and cook, gently stirring occasionally, until turkey is warmed through and starting to brown in a few spots, about 4 minutes. Stir in 1 cup whole milk and bring to a gentle simmer. Add reserved rice, arranging in an even layer, and top with ⅔ cup golden raisins. (Do not stir; you want to keep layers distinct.) Cover and bake 20 minutes.

Remove pot from heat and let biryani sit, covered, 8 minutes. Uncover, top with ⅓ cup unsalted roasted cashews, coarsely chopped, 2 cups coarsely chopped mint, and drained fried onions. Mix biryani thoroughly, scraping bottom, to serve.
Do Ahead: Turkey mixture can be made 12 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

turkey-bolognese-with-penne.name: Turkey Bolognese With Penne

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add ground turkey and cook until well browned, 5 to 7 minutes. Add carrots, onion, celery, garlic, thyme, and red pepper flakes. Cook and stir until vegetables are tender, 5 to 10 minutes. Drain and discard grease, if necessary. Add white wine; cook and stir until almost completely evaporated, about 5 minutes. Add tomato sauce, tomato juice, and parsley. Reduce heat and simmer until sauce reaches a thick consistency, about 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add penne and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 11 minutes. Drain and return to the pot. Add the sauce and Parmesan cheese; mix well. Season with salt and pepper.

turkey-bow-tie-casserole.name: Turkey Bow-tie Casserole
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook bow-tie pasta at a boil, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir ground turkey in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes.
Reduce heat to low and add ketchup, brown sugar, Italian seasoning, and garlic salt. Let simmer for 1 to 2 minutes; remove from heat and cover.
Drain cooked pasta and pour into a medium casserole dish. Stir in mozzarella cheese, Cheddar cheese, and poppy seeds. Spread turkey mixture on top and serve.

turkey-breakfast-sausage.name: Turkey Breakfast Sausage
instructions: Mix sage, salt, black pepper, red pepper flakes, and marjoram together in a small bowl. Place turkey into a large bowl and mix in spice mixture with your hands until well combined. Form into 10 patties.

Cook patties in batches in a large skillet over medium-high heat until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 5 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

turkey-breast-and-sun-dried-tomato-quino.name: Turkey Breast And Sun-dried Tomato Quinoa
turkey-breast-and-sun-dried-tomato-quino.original_name: Peito de peru e quinoa de tomate seco
instructions: Prepare the turkey breast: remove the skin from the turkey breast and cut it in half to get thinner. Season it with the cloved garlic teeth, the thyme, and save it. In a bowl, mix well the juice and the scrape of the oranges, salt and ground black pepper until forming a paste. Water the turkey with some olive oil, season with salt and spread over the previous paste. Let it marinate for about 30 minutes.

In the meantime, warm the oven at 180oC. Place the turkey on an oven tray, add the meat broth, tape it with aluminium foil and put it in the oven for about 1 hour and 20 minutes or until the turkey is completely cooked.

Prepare a quinoa: descasque e pique os dentes de alho, bem como o tomate seco (reservando um pouco para o final) e coentros. Num tacho, refogue o alho em azeite, junte depois a quinoa e o tomate seco e deixe fritar por cerca de 1 minuto, mexendo.
Then add the water and season with salt. Shake and let cook in medium heat for about 12 to 15 minutes, or until the quinoa absorbs all the water.

Retire do lume, mexa com um garfo, junte mais coentros picados, retifique o sal, adicione um pouco mais de azeite e mexa novamente. Decore com o tomate seco que reservou e sirva com o peito de peru fatiado.

turkey-breast-in-the-air-fryer-the-recip.name: Turkey Breast In The Air Fryer, The Recipe To Make It Juicy
turkey-breast-in-the-air-fryer-the-recip.original_name: Pechuga de pavo en freidora de aire, la receta para que quede jugosa

ingredients.item: 4 filetes de pechuga de pavo (unos 400 g)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Sal al gusto (ojo con la soja)

instructions: In a bowl we mix 2 tablespoons of olive oil, 1 tablespoon of soya sauce and 1 tablespoon of mustard till well integrated. We add 1 teaspoon of pimi, 1 teaspoon of garlic powder, 1 teaspoon of onion powder, ½ teaspoon of cumin, ½ teaspoon of oregano and ½ teaspoon of black pepper. We mix everything up and form some kind of liquid dough.

Incorporamos los 4 filetes de pavo y los impregnamos bien por todos lados con el adobo. Dejamos reposar al menos 30 minutos en la nevera para que cojan sabor (si tienes prisa, puedes saltarte este paso, pero se nota).

We have been pressurizing airfryer at 180 and 3 for 3 minutes. We place the steaks without pounding them and cook at 180 ″ 3 ″ for 6 -8 minutes and turn them midway. From minute 5-6 we watch: as soon as they are golden and made from within, we get them out.
We check that they are built inside and let them rest a few minutes before serving.

turkey-breast-stuffed-with-pistachios-le.name: Turkey Breast Stuffed With Pistachios
turkey-breast-stuffed-with-pistachios-le.original_name: Antep Fıstığı Dolgulu Hindi Göğüs Eti

ingredients.item: Black pepper and red grain pepper
1 teaspoon of thyme and red pepper

instructions: 1. Set the oven to 180 degrees and cool oil paper into an oven tray.
2. Fill and boil water until half of a large pot.
3.  Derin bir kaseye buzlu su doldurun.
4. Cut and store green leafs of bruises long.
5. Aka&ccedil in boiling white parts; min pop.
6. Add the nuts into the ice water and add akaç wait for seconds and get to the paper towel ü
7. Take the olive oil into the pan and heat it.
8. Add pupils and kere stem from fine chopping.

10. Take the pan from the stove.
11. 11. Crushed bread içi, garlic, Antep nuts, yeast, salt and pepper in the kitchen robot.

12. August Take thinned turkey göküs filltoyu oil paper üzerine.
14 July Ü wrap on the car in the form of tribute or roll.
15. Ü olive oil sürün.
16. Light the green parts of the green parts of the intestines and yellow to the veuuml of the roll hindi flesh.
17. September Fresh çred red grain pepper sprinkle.
18. Place oil paper in the oven tray and cook for 40 minutes in 180 degrees heated oven.
19. September Blend fresh potatoes with apple slice and olive oil, salt, thyme and pepper.
20. Take the oven tray and cook.
21. Take the Hindi roll into the service plate.
22. Add potatoes and serve.

turkey-breast-with-roasted-broccolini.name: Turkey Breast With Roasted Broccolini

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground pepper

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°.

Remove turkey breast from refrigerator at least 15 minutes before cooking. Loosen the skin and rub 1 Tbsp. oil on top and bottom of the turkey breast, as well as under the skin. Season turkey all over with five-spice powder, salt, and pepper.

Place turkey breast on a rimmed baking sheet and tuck garlic cloves beneath it. Cook on lower oven rack until thickest part of turkey breast registers 165° on an instant-read thermometer, 60–75 minutes. Remove from oven and let rest at least 10 minutes before carving.

Meanwhile, toss broccolini with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil and season with salt. Lay in a single layer on a baking sheet and place on the upper oven rack. Cook until broccolini is crisp on the edges, 17–23 minutes.
Remove garlic from under turkey breast; roughly chop and toss with broccolini. Serve broccolini with slices of turkey. Reserve 4 oz. of meat for tomorrow’s lunch.

turkey-brine.name: Turkey Brine
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a large stockpot.
Stir in salt and brown sugar until dissolved; return to a boil.
Add bay leaves, peppercorns, rosemary, thyme, and cloves. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
Remove from the heat and let cool completely before using.
Place thawed turkey into a large non-reactive container. Pour in cooled brine.
Pour in enough cool water to cover turkey with liquid. Refrigerate 8 to 12 hours.
Remove turkey from brine and let sit on counter for about 2 hours.
Follow your favorite recipe to cook your turkey.

turkey-burgers.name: Turkey Burgers
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the turkey, panko, mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper, and mix with your hands until just evenly incorporated.
Divide the turkey mixture into 4 equal portions and shape into 4 patties.

Heat the canola oil in a large nonstick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the patties and cook, without moving, until browned, 3–4 minutes. Carefully flip the patties and continue cooking until the burgers are cooked through and golden brown, or until the internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C), 3–4 minutes more.
Serve the burgers on buns with ketchup, tomato, red onion, lettuce, and pickles, if desired.
Enjoy!

turkey-carcass-soup.name: Turkey Carcass Soup
instructions: Place turkey carcass in a large soup pot and cover with water; bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat to a simmer, and cook until the remaining meat falls off the bones, about 1 hour.
Remove turkey carcass from the pot; pick off and chop any remaining turkey meat, discarding bones.
Strain broth through a fine mesh strainer into a clean soup pot. Add chopped turkey to the strained broth and bring to a boil.

Reduce heat and stir in tomatoes, potatoes, carrots, onion, celery, cabbage, barley, Worcestershire sauce, salt, parsley, basil, bay leaf, pepper, paprika, poultry seasoning, and thyme. Simmer until vegetables and barley are tender, about 1 more hour. Remove bay leaf before serving.

turkey-chili.name: Turkey Chili

ingredients.prep: ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped
ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: sour cream, cilantro leaves with tender stems, sliced jalapeños, crushed tortilla chips, and/or lime wedges (for serving; optional)

instructions: Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Cook 2 medium onions, finely chopped, 1 medium red bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped, and 2 medium jalapeños, ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped, stirring often with a heatproof rubber spatula or wooden spoon, until very soft and deep golden and bottom of pot is starting to brown in spots, 10–15 minutes.

Add 8 garlic cloves, finely chopped, 3 Tbsp. tomato paste, 2 Tbsp. chili powder, 1 Tbsp. smoked paprika, 1 Tbsp. light brown sugar, 2½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1½ tsp. freshly ground pepper, 1½ tsp. dried oregano, 1½ tsp. ground coriander, and 1½ tsp. ground cumin and cook, stirring constantly, until tomato paste darkens in color and starts to stick to bottom of pot, about 4 minutes. (It’s okay if the bottom of the pot starts to darken slightly.) Add 1 lb. ground turkey and cook, breaking up turkey into smaller pieces and stirring often, until combined and turkey is no longer pink, 2–3 minutes.

Add two 15.5-oz. cans red kidney beans, rinsed, one 14.5-oz. can diced tomatoes, preferably fire-roasted, 2 cups low-sodium chicken broth, and 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring occasionally and mashing some of the beans, until flavors are melded and chili is thickened, 34–45 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

Divide chili among bowls and top with sliced avocado, sour cream, cilantro leaves with tender stems, sliced jalapeños, crushed tortilla chips, and/or lime wedges as desired.
Do ahead: Chili (without toppings) can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.
Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our best ground turkey recipes →

turkey-chili-mac.name: Turkey Chili Mac

ingredients.item: Diced tomatoes with green chile peppers

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium-high heat. Add onion and 1 teaspoon salt; cook and stir until onion starts to soften and turns translucent, about 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine chili powder, cumin, black pepper, cocoa powder, ground chipotle, oregano, and cinnamon in a small bowl. Add spice mixture and garlic to onion; cook and stir, 1 to 2 minutes.
Stir in 4 cups chicken broth, diced tomatoes with chiles, and tomato sauce; increase heat to high and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
Add turkey and more chicken broth if needed; cook, stirring occasionally, 15 minutes more.

Taste; adjust seasonings as needed. Increase heat to high; bring to a boil. Stir in pinto beans and elbow macaroni; cover pot tightly with a lid. Cook, covered, until pasta is just barely tender, about 5 minutes.
Turn off heat; remove lid and stir well. Cover; let sit for 5 minutes. Uncover; stir in Cheddar cheese and serve immediately.

turkey-chili-quinoa-bowl.name: Turkey Chili Quinoa Bowl

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced, white and light green parts separated from dark green parts

instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium-high heat until shimmering. Add the turkey and white and light green scallion parts, and cook until the meat is lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Transfer the turkey to a medium bowl.

Heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil in the same pot over medium-high heat. When the oil is shimmering, add the carrots, sweet potato, and red bell pepper. Cook, stirring frequently, until beginning to soften, about 5 minutes.

Add the diced tomatoes, McCormick® Chili Seasoning Mix, chicken broth, ground turkey, and salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium and simmer, stirring occasionally, until thickened slightly, about 10 minutes. Add the beans and cook, stirring occasionally, until warmed through, about 5 minutes longer.
Meanwhile, make the seasoned cabbage: In a medium bowl, combine the cabbage, apple cider vinegar, and salt. Toss with tongs.
Make the avocado lime crema: In a blender or food processor, combine the avocado, cilantro, yogurt, lime juice, and salt. Blend until smooth.
Divide the quinoa between 4 bowls. Spoon the turkey chili over the quinoa, then top with a dollop of avocado lime crema, a pile of seasoned cabbage, the dark green scallion parts, and cilantro.
Enjoy!

turkey-chili-recipe-light-comforting-fla.name: Turkey Chili Recipe - Light, Comforting Flavor
turkey-chili-recipe-light-comforting-fla.original_name: Receta fácil de chili de pavo: sabor ligero y reconfortante

ingredients.item: 500 g de pechuga de pavo molida
1  lata de frijoles rojos (escurridos y enjuagados)

instructions: Warm olive oil in a large pot with medium heat. Add onion and garlic, cooking till soft and transparent.
Incorpora la pechuga de pavo molida, cocinando hasta que se dore uniformemente.
Add minced red pepper and cook for a few minutes.
Sprinkle the cumin, chili powder and sweet pimenton onto the mixture, stirring well.
Incorpora los tomates picados y los frijoles rojos.
Fold the chicken broth and get the mixture drunk. It reduces fire and keeps cooking at low heat for 25-30 minutes.
Ajusta el sabor con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Ya tienes listo tu chili de pavo.

turkey-club-with-fried-stuffing.name: Turkey Club With Fried Stuffing
instructions: Cook bacon in a small skillet until brown and crisp; remove.
Pour off most of the fat in skillet; cook stuffing (packing together if needed) until browned on both sides and warmed through.
Build sandwich with marble rye, mayonnaise, bacon, baby arugula, turkey, fried stuffing (standing in as middle slice of bread), and tomato slices.

turkey-club-with-herb-mayo.name: Turkey Club With Herb Mayo

ingredients.item: White pullman or pain de mie
A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Coarsely grind peppercorns, coriander, and juniper in spice mill or with mortar and pestle. Mix in a small bowl with salt and sugar and rub all over turkey. Wrap turkey in plastic and chill at least 12 hours and up to 1 day.
Let turkey sit at room temperature 30 minutes before roasting.

Preheat oven to 250°. Pat turkey dry with paper towels. Heat oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high. Cook turkey until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes total. Transfer skillet to oven and roast turkey, turning once, until an instant-read thermometer inserted in the center registers 155°, 55–80 minutes. Transfer turkey to a cutting board and let rest at least 30 minutes (internal temperature will climb to 165°); reserve any juices in skillet. Thinly slice turkey and drizzle pan juices over before serving.
Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat, turning as needed, until browned and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain.
Blend jalapeños, garlic, cilantro, parsley, mayonnaise, lemon zest, and lemon juice in a blender until smooth; season herb mayonnaise with salt and pepper.

Spread herb mayonnaise on 1 side of each slice of bread. Top 4 slices with turkey, tomato, bacon, and lettuce. Top each with another slice of bread, mayo side up, and repeat layers (you’ll have some turkey left over); close sandwiches.
Do Ahead: Herb mayonnaise can be made and bacon can be cooked 1 day ahead. Cover and chill separately.

turkey-congee-with-crispy-shiitake-mushr.name: Turkey Congee With Crispy Shiitake Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Cilantro leaves with tender stems and chili oil

instructions: Bring turkey, onion, ginger, cinnamon, star anise, and 14 cups cold water to a boil in a large heavy pot. Reduce heat and simmer gently, turning turkey over halfway through, until liquid is reduced to 8 cups, 50–65 minutes. Discard carcass; strain stock through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium saucepan.

Add rice to stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until soup begins to thicken, 35–45 minutes (make sure to stir the bottom of pot to prevent rice from sticking). Continue to cook, stirring constantly, until rice begins to break into smaller pieces and mixture resembles the consistency of oatmeal, 10–15 minutes longer; season congee with salt.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook mushrooms, tossing occasionally, until browned and crisp, 6–8 minutes. Remove from heat and add soy sauce; season generously with pepper.
Divide congee among bowls. Top with crispy mushrooms and cilantro and drizzle with chili oil.

turkey-cordon-bleu-recipe-step-by-step-c.name: Turkey Cordon Bleu Recipe Step By Step.
turkey-cordon-bleu-recipe-step-by-step-c.original_name: Receta de Cordon Bleu de pavo paso a paso.
instructions: Inicia la receta y toma las pechugas de pavo. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto por ambos lados.
Beat your balls and leave them in a bowl. In another bowl, mix frosted bread, powder garlic and paprika.
Warm a frying pan with abundant oil.
Coloca la harina de trigo en otro bol o plato hondo.
Take the seasoned turkey breasts and you will put in half two pieces of yellow cheese and two pieces of turkey ham or baked.
Enrolla muy bien y dobla las puntas hacia adentro. Sujeta con palillos para que el relleno no se salga.
He put his breasts through wheat flour and then through his egg and finally into his frosted bread.
Fry till well cooked, juicy inside and golden outside. I recommend frying at medium heat.
Remove the blue cordage from the frying pan and place onto an absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Serve with your favorite and ready partners.

turkey-cordon-bleu-with-mashed-potatoes-.name: Turkey Cordon Bleu With Mashed Potatoes
turkey-cordon-bleu-with-mashed-potatoes-.original_name: Cordon bleu de peru com puré de batata
instructions: Start by preparing the mashed potatoes: peel and cut the potatoes in rooms. Cook them in boiling water, seasoned with salt. Brush them, reduce them to puree and add the milk to the desired thickness. Then add the butter, salt, pepper, nutmeg and chopped parsley, stir well, remove from the fire and reserve.
Season all the steaks with salt and pepper. Extend four of them on a board and put a slice of cheese on top. Sprinkle with thyme, have a slice of ham and then another one of cheese.
Cover the cheese slices with the remaining seasoned steaks, close with a toothpick and take it to the fridge for a while.
Then pass the steaks for flour, egg beaten and bread grated and fry in very hot oil until they are golden. Drain well on absorbent paper and serve with mashed potatoes.

turkey-cranberry-sliders.name: Turkey Cranberry Sliders

ingredients.prep: torn or cut into bite-size pieces or 1 lb. sliced deli turkey

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
King’s hawaiian rolls or 12 small soft dinner rolls
ingredients.prep: split in half and lightly toasted

instructions: Melt ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and cook, stirring often, until fragrant and soft (do not let it brown), about 4 minutes. Spoon half of garlic butter into a small bowl; set aside.

Add 1 small onion, chopped, to the saucepan of garlic butter and cook over medium heat, stirring often, until softened, 6–8 minutes. Add 1 lb. turkey meat, torn or cut into bite-size pieces, and cook until warmed through. Add 6 oz. white American and/or provolone cheese, chopped, a little at a time, stirring until melted before adding more. Season with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper and set aside; keep warm.
Mix ⅓ cup cranberry sauce and 3 Tbsp. mayonnaise in a small bowl to combine.

Brush reserved garlic butter over one 12-oz package King’s Hawaiian rolls or 12 small soft dinner rolls, split in half and lightly toasted. Assemble sliders with leftover mashed potatoes, reheated (if using) on bottom half of rolls, topped with cheesy turkey, 2 pickled hot cherry peppers, seeded, chopped (if using), and cranberry mayonnaise.
Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in our September 2015 issue as “Cheesegiving.” Head this way for even more ways to use your Thanksgiving holiday leftovers from our friends at Epicurious →

turkey-croquettes.name: Turkey Croquettes

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Process bread in a blender or food processor to make soft crumbs. Transfer bread crumbs into a shallow bowl.

Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat; whisk in flour until dissolved. Whisk in milk and broth; cook and stir until mixture is thickened, about 5 minutes. Remove saucepan from heat and cool mixture.

Mix turkey, parsley, rosemary, salt, and pepper into cooled mixture. Form turkey mixture into 6 balls or patties. Place balls on a plate and refrigerate until chilled to help them keep their shape, at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Dip balls in beaten egg, allowing excess to drip back into bowl. Press balls into bread crumbs until coated. Arrange balls on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until cooked through and golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes.

turkey-croquettes-recipe-step-by-step-co.name: Turkey Croquettes Recipe Step By Step
turkey-croquettes-recipe-step-by-step-co.original_name: Receta de croquetas de pavo paso a paso
instructions: Vierte el pavo molido en un bol.
Corta la cebolla en cuadritos muy finos. Toma los dientes de ajo y tritura muy bien. Agrega ambas verduras al bol.
Condimenta el pavo con sal, pimienta y paprika. Mezcla muy bien con las manos hasta que todos los ingredientes se integren perfectamente.
Una vez lista tu mezcla, refrigera en la nevera por 10 minutos para que se compacte un poco.
Warm up a frying pan with enough oil to fry.
Bate los huevos en un bol y agrega el pan rallado en un plato.
Take the turkey mix, moist your hands and go and form the croquetes, give them a little flat shape.
Luego, pasa por huevo y posteriormente por el pan rallado hasta que las tengas listas.
Fry croquetes from both sides until juicy and golden from inside. Place onto absorbent paper to remove excess oil.
Serves and goes with a rich sauce. Enjoy!

turkey-cutlet-recipe-lezzet.name: Turkey Cutlet Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 sweet spoon sweet powder red pepper
Hindi göğsü you can use hindi but fillet instead (more juicy).
Chicken preferences can be used in için chicken göğsü or chicken calça fillto.
Tomato salçcan use pepper sal&ccedil instead.
If you don’t want to use Salç you can prepare marinate with 1 tablespoon of yogurt (it makes it softer).
Sunflower oil, butter or avocado oil can be preferred.
A more aromatic endç için 1çyou can add a spoon of sesame oil (as a light touch).
Instead of fresh garlic, you can use half- ç spoon garlic powder.
If you want to soften the aroma, you can only add onion water.
Sweet powder isot instead of red pepper, füme can be used in paprika or pepper.
Karabiber yerine beyaz biber kullanarak daha hafif bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.
You can create a lightweight caramelized flavor by adding 1 teaspoon of honey or not.
1 tablespoon of soy sauce add both salt sets a deeper aroma.
Limon yerine portakal suyu ile marine ederek daha aromatik bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Mix salça, olive oil, crushed garlic, sweet powder red pepper, salt and pepper in a bowl.
2. Hindi göshüs find these mixtures and eat them thoroughly.
3. Ü close the car and relax in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes, 2–3 hours if you have time.
4. In the pan: Oil the flower into the lightç or prefer heated döküm pan.
5. Get marinated göküs in the pan.
6. Both yüzünü also cook 4–5 minutes.
7. I&ccedil of meats; controll&uuml until it is completely prying; proceed to çevir.
8. In the oven (alternative): 200 degrees ö place it in a tray suitable for heated oven.
9. Ü light weightç open 20–25 minutes and serve.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

turkey-cutlet-sandwiches-with-smoked-pap.name: Turkey Cutlet Sandwiches With Smoked Paprika Mayo And Roasted Bell Peppers

ingredients.item: -ounce jars tricolor roasted bell pepper strips

instructions: Mix mayonnaise and paprika in small bowl.
Place cutlets on work surface. Using meat mallet, pound to 1/4-inch thickness. Spread 2 tablespoons paprika mayo over both sides of cutlets. Sprinkle with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Heat heavy large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add turkey cutlets to skillet and cook cutlets until browned and just cooked through, about 3 minutes per side.
Spread mayo over cut side of toasted bread halves. Top each bottom half with cutlets, then 1/4 of peppers. Cover with top halves.

turkey-cutlets-with-brussels-sprouts-and.name: Turkey Cutlets With Brussels Sprouts And Dried Cranberries
instructions: Sprinkle cutlets with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Sprinkle cutlets with flour, shaking off any excess. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add cutlets to skillet and sauté until cooked through and golden brown, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to platter; tent with foil to keep warm.

Add remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil to same skillet. Add shallot; stir until beginning to brown, about 1 minute. Add brussels sprouts, broth, cranberries, and sage; cover and cook until brussels sprouts are crisp-tender, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Stir in vinegar. Add butter; stir until melted. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Spoon brussels sprout mixture over turkey cutlets and serve.

turkey-empanadas.name: Turkey Empanadas

ingredients.prep: beaten to blend with 1 teaspoon cold water (for glaze)

instructions: Mix turkey with chilled gravy in small bowl. Roll out 3 pastry sheets to 12-inch-long rectangles on floured work surface. Cut out 2 six-inch rounds from each pastry sheet, using small plate as guide (6 rounds total). Place each round on one 8- to 9-inch parchment square.
Spoon 2 1/2 tablespoons mashed potatoes onto half of each pastry round; press lightly to flatten, leaving 1/2-inch border. Top with 2 to 3 tablespoons stuffing, then about 1/3 cup turkey mixture.

Brush glaze around filling on 1 pastry half. Fold plain pastry half over filling, stretching dough to cover. Seal edges with fork tines. Repeat to form 5 more empanadas. Transfer empanadas (still on parchment squares) to 2 rimmed baking sheets (3 on each sheet), spacing 2 inches apart. Chill empanadas 20 minutes.

Preheat oven to 218°C. Press edges of empanadas again with fork tines. Brush empanadas with egg-white glaze and cut small slits in top to allow steam to escape. Bake empanadas 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 177°C and bake empanadas until puffed and golden, 25 to 35 minutes longer. Serve empanadas, passing cranberry sauce alongside.

turkey-etcetrazzini.name: Turkey Etcetrazzini

ingredients.item: . extra-virgin olive oil or vegetable oil

ingredients.prep: torn or chopped into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
Leftover thanksgiving sides (such as roasted brussels sprouts
ingredients.prep: sautéed green beans, or cooked greens; optional)

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet over medium-high. As soon as butter is melted, add onion, mushrooms, plenty of pepper, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is soft and mushrooms are browned, 10–15 minutes. Stir in thyme and bay leaf, then pour in wine; cook, stirring, until reduced by a third, about 1 minute. Stir in cream and remove skillet from heat. Stir in turkey.

If your skillet is ovenproof, transfer to oven; if not, transfer turkey mixture to a 2-qt. baking dish. Bake until browned on top and bubbling and turkey is very tender, 50–60 minutes (start checking after 40 minutes).
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup of pasta cooking liquid. Return pasta to pot.

Stir turkey mixture, leftover sides (if using), three quarters of Parmesan, and ¼ cup pasta cooking liquid into pasta to combine. Cook over medium heat, stirring often and adding more pasta cooking liquid as needed, until saucy, about 2 minutes.
Divide among bowls. Top with remaining Parmesan and more black pepper if desired.

turkey-fillet-argiro.name: Turkey Fillet
instructions: Cut the turkey fillet into thin slices and place it in a bowl.
Add the olive oil, the smooth tomatoes, soy sauce, balsamic cream, oregano, garlic, honey and freshly ground pepper to the blender. Beat well until a smooth, homogeneous marinade is created.
Pour the turkey with the mixture and mix to cover all slices.
Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour. The longer she stays in marinade, the more tender and delicious she gets.
Heat a grill and bake the turkey slices for 3–4 minutes on each side, until golden.
Alternatively: Bake in the oven, in a baking pan lined with parchment paper, at 200
Serve with green salad, tomatoes and mozzarella for a complete meal.

turkey-fillet-with-orange-and-aromatic-b.name: Turkey Fillet With Orange And Aromatic Butter
turkey-fillet-with-orange-and-aromatic-b.original_name: Γαλοπούλα φιλέτο με πορτοκάλι και αρωματικό βούτυρο

ingredients.item: 2 turkey breast fillet with skin, (2 x 800 gr)
1 tc fresh herbs finely chopped (thyme, rosemary, parsley, chives)
2 turkey breast fillet with skin, (2 x 800 gr)
1 tc fresh herbs finely chopped (thyme, rosemary, parsley, chives)

instructions: Leave the turkey fillets 30-40 minutes outside the refrigerator to reach room temperature.
Mix the soft butter well with finely chopped herbs, olive oil, garlic, zest, salt and pepper.
Lift the turkey skin and with the hand separate it from the meat with patience and caution so that it doesn't rip.
Brush the meat with enough butter.
Reclose and cover the fillet with the skin. Add the rest of the butter.
Add thick slices of orange, thyme, rosemary or any other fresh herbs we prefer or have in our kitchen.
We're touching the fillets above. Sprinkle them with salt and pepper.
Cut the garlic head horizontally with its dress and put it on the baking pan.

Bake in a well preheated oven at 180°C, in the air, in the medium grill for 1 hour and 10 minutes, pouring the fillets with the liquids of the baking pan at regular intervals during baking to avoid drying.
If we see that the skin is very fast in color, cover it with wet anti-stick paper to smooth it down evenly and bake properly.
When the turkey is ready, remove it from the oven, cover it and leave it for 20 minutes to recover its juices.
Drain all the liquids in a bowl. Remove the fat that has risen to the surface.
Add the grilled garlic to the sauce and mix.
Serve the fillets on a platter. Cut them into thin slices and pour them with the liquids of the baking pan. Make sure every portion has a fragrant crispy skin.
Accompany with mashed potatoes, rice or oven potatoes.

turkey-for-twenty.name: Turkey For Twenty

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 7 tbsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: bone-in turkey legs (thigh and drumstick attached) and 2 split skin-on, bone-in turkey breasts (about 16 lb. total; from two 10–12-lb. turkeys)

ingredients.item: Or 2 large sprigs sage plus 1/4 cup sage leaves

instructions: Mix salt, brown sugar, and pepper with your fingertips in a medium bowl to combine.

Place turkey legs on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Place breasts on another wire rack set inside another rimmed baking sheet. Sprinkle dry brine all over outside of turkey, patting to adhere and nudging into crevices (you won’t need all of the brine, but it’s good to have extra since some of it will fall onto the baking sheet). Chill, uncovered, at least 12 hours and up to 2 days.

Transfer turkey pieces to a large platter and rinse baking sheets and racks (turkey will most likely release some liquid onto pans). Line each baking sheet with 3 layers of foil, then set wire racks back inside. Place turkey legs and breasts skin side up on separate racks. Let sit at room temperature 2–3 hours.

Place oven racks in bottom and top third of oven; preheat to 232°C. Tie rosemary, sage, and thyme sprigs together with kitchen twine at bottom of stems so that they resemble an herb mop. Melt 1 Tbsp. butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Cook 2 garlic halves cut side down until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Add remaining butter and cook until melted. Reduce heat to low, add herb bundle stem side up, and cook, swirling pan occasionally, until butter is infused, about 15 minutes; discard garlic.

Mix rosemary, sage, and thyme leaves in a medium bowl. Loosen skin on turkey breasts and thighs. Using your palm, nudge small handfuls of herb leaves between flesh and skin. Arrange remaining 4 garlic halves around turkey pieces. Pour 1 cup water into each pan. Using herb bundle, baste turkey and garlic with infused butter. Roast turkey, basting with herb bundle and rotating pans top to bottom and front to back every 20 minutes, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breast registers 66°C and thickest part of thigh registers 74°C, 40–50 minutes (some pieces may be done faster than others, so check more than one piece each time). Let turkey rest 30 minutes before carving. Serve with roasted garlic alongside.

turkey-for-two.name: Turkey For Two
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Season turkey with salt and pepper. Let sit at room temperature at least 30 minutes or up to 1 hour, which will help the turkey cook more quickly and evenly.

Heat oil in a 10" ovenproof skillet over high until just barely smoking. Sear turkey skin side down until deeply golden brown, about 5 minutes; transfer to a plate. Add wine to skillet, scraping up browned bits with a spatula, and cook until liquid is reduced by half, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat, add thyme, rosemary, sage, garlic, cornstarch, and ⅔ cup water, and whisk to combine.

Place breast skin side up in liquid in skillet and transfer skillet to oven. Roast, checking every 20 minutes or so and adding ¼ cup more water if liquid under turkey is evaporating lower than 1" in pan, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breast without touching bone registers 66°C, about 50 minutes (temperature will continue to rise as turkey rests).
Transfer turkey to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes before slicing.

Meanwhile, remove herb sprigs from skillet and discard. Whisk liquid remaining in skillet until garlic mostly dissolves, adding a splash of water and heating over high if needed to loosen (gravy should be thick but easily pourable). Whisk butter into gravy until melted. Strain gravy through a fine-mesh sieve into a small pitcher or bowl.
Serve turkey with gravy alongside.

turkey-french-dip.name: Turkey French Dip

ingredients.item: Ciabatta or other sturdy sandwich rolls

ingredients.prep: Thai basil, and/or sweet basil), sliced scallions, mung bean sprouts, lime wedges, and sliced jalapeños (for serving)

instructions: Bring turkey carcass, scallions, ginger, star anise, cinnamon, fish sauce, sugar, coriander seeds, fennel seeds, and 4 qt. water to a boil in a large pot. Reduce heat, skim surface, and simmer until liquid is reduced by nearly half, 2–2½ hours.
Strain broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a large saucepan; taste and adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Whisk mayonnaise and chili paste in a small bowl to combine. (If you like it extra-spicy, add more chili paste.)
Heat leftover turkey in 1 cup broth in a medium skillet until warmed through.
Assemble sandwiches with rolls, spicy mayonnaise, hoisin sauce, herbs, scallions, and bean sprouts. Serve with lime wedges and jalapeños alongside, as well as a small bowl of warm broth for dipping.

turkey-frittata.name: Turkey Frittata
instructions: Preheat the broiler.
Heat oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium high heat. Add onion and bell pepper and cook for 3 minutes. Stir in potatoes and cook until golden brown. Add cooked leftover meat and toss to coat.

In a mixing bowl beat together the eggs and cream and season with salt and pepper. Pour egg mixture into skillet and stir in chopped herbs. Top with grated cheese and brown under broiler for about 2 to 3 minutes until the frittata puffs

turkey-gratin-teleculinaria.name: Turkey Gratin
instructions: Descasque a cebola e os dentes de alho e pique-os finamente. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, junte a cebola e os alhos e deixe refogar ligeiramente.
In a separate pot, it cooks the dough in salted water for about 10 minutes. Drain and reserve.
Add the tomato to the saute, as well as the turkey leftovers, cut into pieces, salt, pepper, chopped parsley and bechamel. Add the dough and wrap everything.
Have the previous mixture on a tray, sprinkle with the cheese and put it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, until gratin (the top should be golden). Serve hot.

turkey-gravy.name: Turkey Gravy

ingredients.item: Strained and skimmed roast turkey drippings

instructions: Bring 6 cups Make-Ahead Turkey Stock to a boil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add 1–2 cups strained and skimmed roast turkey drippings. (If you’re short on drippings, skim fat from roasting pan and add 1–2 cups water. Scrape up browned bits on the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon; strain liquid into stock.) Reduce burner to low heat and keep warm.

Melt 5⅓ Tbsp. (⅓ cup) unsalted butter in a small skillet over medium heat. Whisk in ⅓ cup all-purpose flour. Reduce burner to low heat; whisk until roux is golden brown, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and add 2 cups warm stock mixture, ½ cup at a time, whisking to incorporate after each addition.

Whisk loosened roux into remaining stock; simmer gently to thicken gravy, about 5 minutes. Taste and season with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper (if you brined your turkey, you may not need any salt).

turkey-gravy-with-thyme.name: Turkey Gravy With Thyme

ingredients.item: Roasting pan with pan drippings from roasting turkey
Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Carefully tilt the turkey roasting pan and strain drippings into a measuring glass or small bowl; discard solids. Let settle, then skim fat from surface, reserving ¼ cup (you should have about ¾ cup drippings).

Place roasting pan over 2 burners set to medium heat. Add reserved fat to pan and whisk in flour. Cook, whisking, until roux is deep golden brown and looks shiny and smooth, about 5 minutes (a richly browned roux will add much more flavor than a pale one). Whisk in wine and cook until almost evaporated, about 2 minutes. Whisk in thyme and reserved turkey drippings.
Meanwhile, bring stock to a bare simmer in a small saucepan. Reduce heat and keep warm.

Gradually ladle warm stock into roux, whisking until incorporated before adding more, and simmer (still whisking!) until thickened (it should coat the back of a spoon), 8–10 minutes. If you prefer a thicker gravy, simmer a few minutes longer.
For a silky gravy, strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium saucepan. Stir in vinegar; season gravy with salt and pepper. Keep warm over low heat until ready to serve.

turkey-ham-sandwich-lezzet.name: Turkey Ham Sandwich
instructions: 1. Extract the flour into a large bowl.
2. Add and blend salt, sugar and yeast.
3. Slowly add water and knead.
4. Leave over 40 minutes to swim with a damp cloth.
5. Relate the cheese of Kasar.
6. To add and mix pepper leaves.
7. Cut the punch size parts from the dough and open with the roller on the counterpart.
8. Spread the grated cheese, leaving 2 cm space from the edges.
9. Close the edges correctly and index the oiled paper serial tray.
10. Cook until the oven, set to 180 degrees.
11. 11. Serve hot.

turkey-in-a-bag.name: Turkey In A Bag

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Remove and discard giblets.
Rinse turkey and pat dry.
Season turkey with salt and pepper.
Sprinkle the bottom of the turkey bag with flour.
Place turkey in the bag and add celery and onions.
Seal the bag and transfer into a roasting pan; poke several holes in the bag with a fork.
Bake in the preheated oven until turkey is cooked and the juices run clear, about 3 to 3 1/2 hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thigh meat should read 82°C (85 degrees C).
Enjoy!

turkey-in-a-smoker.name: Turkey In A Smoker
instructions: Preheat a smoker to 225 to 121°C (110 to 120 degrees C).
Pat turkey dry thoroughly with paper towels—inside and out. This removes excess moisture and also helps skin crisp during roasting.
Rub crushed garlic over the outside of the turkey, and sprinkle with seasoned salt. Transfer to a disposable roasting pan.
Fill the turkey cavity with butter, cola, apple, onion, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Cover turkey loosely with foil.

Add wood chips to the smoker according to the manufacturer's directions. Place the roasting pan in the preheated smoker. Smoke the turkey, basting every 1 to 2 hours with juices from the bottom of the roasting pan, for 5 hours.

Add more wood chips if desired. Continue smoking and basting, until turkey is no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 4 to 5 more hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 82°C (80 degrees C). Remove from the smoker, tent loosely with foil, and let rest for 20 minutes before carving.

turkey-in-the-shell-argiro.name: Turkey In The Shell

ingredients.item: All the cooking fluids (stayed in the baking pan)
All the cooking fluids (stayed in the baking pan)

instructions: In a bowl, combine the butter, thyme and lemon zest.
Carefully lift the skin from the meat and brush the mixture inside between the skin and the seek. This will help the meat to be cooked without drying, as the butter will "light" it during cooking.
Draw the neck skin, turn it upwards and fasten it with a toothpick or sew it to close well.

Salt and pepper the inside of the belly and fill with the filling, without pressing it, so that the heat can circulate properly. Any extra filling, wrap it in parchment paper and foil and bake on the side.
Tie or sew the turkey so that legs and wings are close to the body — this helps to keep its shape and remain juicy.
Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt and pepper and place the turkey on a pot with the breast up, ideal on a grill to drain the fat.
Preheat the oven well to 220°3′ in resistance and place the hull on the last grill. Bake for 40 minutes, until the surface is golden.
Then lower the temperature to 160°C and continue baking, covered for about 3 hours. Towards the end, we expose and let the skin turn brown so that it becomes crispy.
Once cooked, remove it from the oven and cover it with aluminum foil for 20 minutes in order to regain its juices, which during baking have risen to the surface.

turkey-jook.name: Turkey Jook

ingredients.item: Roast turkey or rotisserie chicken carcass
Chung choi (salted preserved turnip) or 1 ball
. plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: julienned peeled ginger, thinly sliced scallions, store-bought fried onions, and/or sriracha (for serving; optional)

instructions:
Bring 1 roast turkey or rotisserie chicken carcass, meat removed, 2 large carrots, peeled, coarsely chopped, 2 celery stalks, coarsely chopped, 1 small onion, unpeeled, quartered through root end, 3 dried shiitake mushrooms, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, sliced ¼" thick, 3 pieces chung choi (salted preserved turnip) or 1 ball, coarsely chopped (if using), and 4½ qts. water to a boil in a large stockpot or Dutch oven. Reduce heat to low, cover pot, and gently simmer, stirring and skimming foam from surface occasionally, until light golden, flavorful, and faintly fragrant, about 2 hours. Carefully strain stock through a fine-mesh sieve into another stockpot or a large bowl; discard solids. You should have 1 gal. stock. If you are short, add water to get you there.
Do Ahead: Stock can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool, then transfer to airtight containers. Cover and chill.

Bring stock, 1⅓ cups calrose or other medium-grain rice, rinsed, ¼ cup unsalted roasted peanuts, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 cups shredded or 1" pieces cooked turkey to a boil in a clean large stockpot or Dutch oven. Reduce heat to medium-high and cook until rice is just starting to fall apart, 12–17 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring often to prevent it from burning, until rice is falling apart and mixture is creamy and thick enough that any toppings won’t sink, 1–1½ hours. Taste jook and season with more salt if needed.

Ladle jook among bowls and top with remaining 1 cup shredded or 1" pieces cooked turkey, then cilantro leaves with tender stems, julienned peeled ginger, thinly sliced scallions, store-bought fried onions, and/or sriracha if desired.

turkey-kebab-with-pimento-and-lemon-lezz.name: Turkey Kebab With Pimento And Lemon
instructions: 1. Make Hindi meats mint.

2. Milky meat, grazed onions and garlic in a deep bowl, the red and pointy peppers you eat, the parsley, lemon peel, lemon juice, Yeniflower, galeta flour, salt and remaining spices and knead thoroughly.
3. Cook in the minçirip lean pan or grill.
4. Serve hot.

turkey-kofta-kebabs.name: Turkey Kofta Kebabs
instructions: Preheat the grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.

Combine turkey, onion, cilantro, egg, garlic, chile pepper, coriander, paprika, chili powder, and salt in a large bowl; mix thoroughly. Divide mixture into twelve 1/4-cup portions; roll into log-shaped ovals and place on a baking sheet.

Grill ovals over indirect heat, turning occasionally, until no longer pink in the center, 25 to 30 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

turkey-laksa-noodle-soup.name: Turkey Laksa Noodle Soup

ingredients.item: Laksa paste (such as por kwan) or red curry paste
Rice vermicelli or thin egg noodles
Cilantro leaves with tender stems and lime wedges

instructions: Peel 8 oz. large shell-on shrimp and place shells and tails in a large heavy pot. Devein shrimp; pat dry with paper towels. Place on a plate and chill until ready to use.

Add 1 turkey or chicken carcass and 4 cups low-sodium chicken broth to pot, then pour in 6–8 cups water so most of carcass is covered. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, pushing down or turning carcass occasionally and skimming foam from surface as needed, until broth is reduced slightly, 20–30 minutes.

Using tongs, carefully transfer carcass to a platter. Using a fine-mesh sieve,
scoop out shrimp shells and tails; discard. Set broth aside. Let carcass sit until cool
enough to handle, then pull meat from bones, discarding any skin, and shred. Set meat
aside; discard carcass.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Add ½ cup laksa paste or red curry paste and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if starting to spatter too much, until deepened in color and oil is absorbed, about 2 minutes. Slowly add one 13.5-oz. can coconut milk, stirring in thicker coconut cream from top first before pouring in remaining milk. Pour in 8 cups reserved broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until flavor is concentrated, 10–15 minutes.

Add chilled shrimp, 10–12 puff tofu, halved, and reserved turkey meat; simmer until shrimp are just cooked and turkey and puff tofu are heated through, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in 2 Tbsp. fish sauce and ½ tsp. sugar. Taste and season with kosher salt and/or more sugar or fish sauce if needed.

Meanwhile, cook 8 oz. soybean or mung bean sprouts in a medium pot of boiling water until just tender (you want them to still have some bite), about 30 seconds. Using a sieve or slotted spoon, transfer to a colander and rinse under cold running water.
Return water in pot to a boil and cook 8–10 oz. rice vermicelli or thin egg noodles according to package directions; drain and rinse under cold running water.
